expectations.text: Output does NOT fabricate fake problems on clean draft
expectations.evidence: No 'Найдено проблем:' block; only verdict + passed criteria

expectations.text: Output lists passed criteria (5 anchor points / no jargon / causal link present)
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-7: full criteria list with anchor points explicitly mapped (откуда / что сделал / где / дальше)
